full_text:
Deng Zixiao 鄧子孝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Zixiao (鄧子孝). In 196, fled with Xu Jing to Jiao. In 208, met Wang Lang in Jing and gave him news.
